'''Port Tower One''' was a monitoring station at [[Corellian Port Control]] on [[Level 88]] on the moon [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. The port tower doubled as a covert station for [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForce]] operatives guarding contraband munitions in the warehouse district. Special Forces commando [[Spane Covis]] was stationed there shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] learned of the Rebel presence on Nar Shaddaa, and sent two camouflaged [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class Assault Shuttles]] to raze the port. Large sections of the port tower were destroyed during the siege, but the small band of Rebels managed to largely survive the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] onslaught.
